title: HOBBY LIFE 1-Piece 80 Litre Plastic Rectangular Multi-Box with Wheels
features: Hobby Life Rectangular Multi-Box With Wheels - 80 Lt
Food safe, dishwasher safe, microwave safe, deepfreeze safe
description: Product Description Another fantastic high quality storage box which is part of our trademark Multi-Box range. The wheels on the underside of this box make it easier to transport heavier contents. The locking clips ensure a tight fitting lid keeps contents safe and secure. Made from the highest quality raw materials, this product is very durable and easy to clean. Box Contains 1 x Hobby Life Rectangular Multi-Box With Wheels - 80 Lt
